page_metadata.biotools__summary: DFLpred webserver is designed for the prediction of disordered flexible linker (DFL). The server generates numeric score for each residue in the input protein sequence that quantifies putative propensity to form a DFL.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DFLpred webserver is designed for the prediction of disordered flexible linker (DFL). The server generates numeric score for each residue in the input protein sequence that quantifies putative propensity to form a DFL.
